108:1: إِ<tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed><tajweed class=madda_obligatory>َآ</tajweed> أَعْطَيْنَ<tajweed class=madda_normal>ـٰ</tajweed>كَ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْكَوْثَرَ
108:3: إِ<tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْأَ<tajweed class=qalaqah>بْ</tajweed>تَرُ
